item.title: Tensions are rising in Spain after the murder of 39-y-old David Lledo, beaten to death with baseball bats by 3 Moroccans after stopping them from harassing girls. People gathered at the site, chanting slogans \u201cSpain is Christian, not Muslim\u201d ( video )
item.description: Tensions are rising in Spain after the murder of 39-y-old David Lledo, beaten to death with baseball bats by 3 Moroccans after stopping them from harassing girls. People gathered at the site, chanting slogans \u201cSpain is Christian, not Muslim\u201d
